text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Didja see, Boss? Number one! This here is my true
power!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Didja see, Boss? Number one! This here is my true
power!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Whaddaya say to a havin' a celebration?
choice_data_list: Be careful not to go overboard.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
That's what I wanna hear! Now that it's decided,
let's go get us some sea bream!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Let's toast to good fortune and eat our fill. This
way, we'll come out on top in the next fight too!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Heh heh. You're not satisfied yet?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Heh heh. You're not satisfied yet?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'm pickin' up what you're puttin' down. I needa
keep up my special trainin' for the next race!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
But, once we do hit it big, we gotta throw one
helluva party!
